import { useState } from "react"; import "./Hero.css"; const HERO_IMAGE = "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1583939003579-730e3918a45a?w=1600&q=90&fm=jpg"; export default function Hero({ onWorkClick }) { const [loaded, setLoaded] = useState(false); return (
setLoaded(true)} className={`hero__bg-img${loaded ? " hero__bg-img--loaded" : ""}`} />
{/* Decorative gold border frame */}

Chennai · Tamil Nadu · Since 2012

AYYAN STUDIO AND EVENTS

Capturing Memories, Creating Celebrations and turning special moments into unforgettable experiences.

Scroll
{/* Bottom stats bar */}
{[ { num: "1200+", label: "Weddings" }, { num: "3500+", label: "Happy Families" }, { num: "12", label: "Years of Trust" }, { num: "50+", label: "Awards" }, ].map(({ num, label }) => (
{num} {label}
))}
); }
